svg.title: EMG-Controlled Limb with AI — System diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the full pipeline from EMG muscle signal through feature extraction, cascaded ML models (generic + personal), to motor output and continuous recalibration feedback loop. Homomorphic encryption and edge computing are shown as constraints wrapping the personal model stage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What makes EMG signals hard to parse?')
sendPrompt('How does feature extraction work for EMG signals?')
sendPrompt('Why train on both limbless patients and a control group?')
sendPrompt('What does the generic model learn?')
sendPrompt('How does the personal model adapt over time?')
sendPrompt('How does homomorphic encryption protect user data here?')
sendPrompt('Why run inference on an edge device like a phone?')
sendPrompt('How is motor intent translated to physical movement?')
sendPrompt('What makes this a co-robot rather than just a tool?')
